result.summary: Mapped monday.com’s public developer integration surface: GraphQL API at https://api.monday.com/v2 with public schema/spec endpoints, hosted Platform MCP, local Apps MCP, and the mapps CLI; auth is via personal API token and, for delegated/platform access, monday OAuth app tokens.

personal_api_token.label: Personal API token (V2)
personal_api_token.setup: In monday.com, open your profile or admin area and generate a personal API token as described in [Authentication](https://developer.monday.com/api-reference/docs/authentication). Use that token directly in API requests. If you need app-scoped delegated access instead of a user token, use an OAuth app from the [Developer Center](https://developer.monday.com/apps/docs/the-developer-center) instead.

oauth_app.label: monday app OAuth client
oauth_app.setup: Create an app in the [monday Developer Center](https://developer.monday.com/apps/docs/the-developer-center) using [Create an app](https://developer.monday.com/apps/docs/create-an-app). Configure OAuth and permissions in [OAuth and Permissions](https://developer.monday.com/apps/docs/oauth), then send users through the authorize URL at `https://auth.monday.com/oauth2/authorize` and exchange the code at `https://auth.monday.com/oauth_ms/oauth/token`. monday.com also publishes dynamic client registration at `https://auth.monday.com/oauth_ms/oauth/register`. Request only the scopes your app needs from the documented scope set.
